creator: raimeetravel
caption:
Nothing wrong with it, it’s just different! In the USA it’s extremely rare to see men wearing this and I wonder why our fashion evolved so differently in this way. 

Also this is just a funny thing I noticed when in Spain, Italy, France, and a few other countries!!

My smart travel tip and maybe unpopular opinion: you don’t need to dress like a local when you travel! Yes, be respectful where it genuinely matters like covering up at religious sites, being mindful of conservative areas and generally respectful, but beyond that? Wear what you want!

However it can be fun to blend in a little more, especially if you don’t want to draw too much attention to yourself (also depends where you’re going!) But you dont need to buy a whole new wardrobe for every trip. I love renting clothes instead!! 

What do you think? And would you wear these?? 😆 

#europefashion #jorts
